gestures.mdmPrompt: a person raises one hand and spreads fingers wide while smiling and looking at the class.
a tutor lifts the other hand, extending fingers while enthusiastically counting out loud to engage the audience.
a tutor gestures with one hand as if drawing an imaginary number line in front of them, inviting learners to visualize.
a person points toward the imaginary number line with excitement, directing attention to where the number five would appear.
a tutor takes a small, playful hop forward, mimicking a jumping motion as they describe moving five spaces ahead.
a person looks encouragingly at the camera, spreads arms wide, and invites students to search for small objects at home.
a tutor brings hands together and gestures as if combining objects, encouraging students to think about adding them.
a person claps hands together joyfully while nodding in approval, celebrating the learners' progress and efforts.
a tutor lifts both arms up and smiles broadly while pointing to an imaginary total, emphasizing the excitement of reaching ten.
